meta-description: Learn about prior authorization by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Prior authorization
excerpt: Approval from a health plan that may be required before you get a service or fill a prescription in order for the service or prescription to be covered by your plan.
content: Approval from a health plan that may be required before you get a service or fill a prescription in order for the service or prescription to be covered by your plan.
